allow: Bash(npx shadcn@latest add button card input label badge avatar dialog dropdown-menu select separator sheet skeleton tabs textarea tooltip sonner form table --yes)
Bash(psql -U macbook -d amaia -c "SELECT id, name, email, role, ""passwordHash"" IS NOT NULL as has_password FROM ""User"" ORDER BY ""createdAt"" DESC LIMIT 5;")
Bash(psql -d amaia -c "SELECT id, name, email, role FROM ""User"" WHERE role IN \(''SELLER'', ''ADMIN''\) LIMIT 5;")
Bash(psql -d amaia -c "SELECT email, role, CASE WHEN ""passwordHash"" IS NOT NULL THEN ''yes'' ELSE ''no'' END as has_password FROM ""User"" LIMIT 10;")

Bash(psql -d amaia -c "SELECT ''''Users: '''' || count\(*\) FROM User UNION ALL SELECT ''''Listings: '''' || count\(*\) FROM Listing UNION ALL SELECT ''''Orders: '''' || count\(*\) FROM Order UNION ALL SELECT ''''Cart Items: '''' || count\(*\) FROM CartItem UNION ALL SELECT ''''Categories: '''' || count\(*\) FROM Category;")
Bash(psql -d amaia -c "SELECT id, name, email, role, CASE WHEN ""passwordHash"" IS NOT NULL THEN ''yes'' ELSE ''no'' END as has_pw FROM ""User"";")
Bash(psql -d amaia -c "SELECT email, role FROM ""User"" WHERE email = ''tester@amaia.com'';")
Bash(psql -d amaia -c "UPDATE ""User"" SET role = ''SELLER'' WHERE email = ''tester@amaia.com''; SELECT email, role FROM ""User"" WHERE email = ''tester@amaia.com'';")
Bash(psql -d amaia -c "SELECT id, ""storeName"", slug FROM ""SellerProfile"" WHERE ""userId"" = \(SELECT id FROM ""User"" WHERE email = ''tester@amaia.com''\);")
